roster_delta.desc: Houston Astros activated RHP Bryan Abreu from the restricted list.
Houston Astros optioned LHP Colton Gordon to Sugar Land Space Cowboys.
Detroit Tigers transferred RF Wenceel Pérez from the 10-day injured list to the 60-day injured list. Left orbital fracture.
Detroit Tigers claimed RHP Yilber Díaz off waivers from Arizona Diamondbacks.

New York Yankees activated C Ali Sánchez from the paternity list.
